title: Intelligent Search (smart_search)
impact: Enables reflection-based iterative retrieval that refines results until adequate

resultAdequacy.target: Iterative refinement until results meet adequacy threshold

tasks.title: Create ReflectionManager Class
tasks.description: Create manager for reflection-based retrieval refinement that iteratively improves search results.

implementation.purpose: Implement iterative retrieval that checks result adequacy and refines queries when results are insufficient. Based on SimpleMem's reflection-based approach.
keyDecisions: Query refinement based on missing information types

stepByStep.details: Create the new file in the search directory

stepByStep.action: Add adequacy calculation and query refinement methods

acceptanceCriteria: Query refinement based on missing information
Max iteration limit prevents infinite loops

tasks.title: Implement smart_search MCP Tool
tasks.description: Add MCP tool combining query planning, hybrid search, and reflection-based refinement.

implementation.purpose: Expose intelligent search capability that automatically plans and refines queries for best results.
keyDecisions: Orchestrate QueryAnalyzer, QueryPlanner, HybridSearch, and ReflectionManager
Return plan, iterations, and adequacy in response

stepByStep.action: Add import for ReflectionManager to toolHandlers.ts

acceptanceCriteria: Response includes analysis, plan, reflection info, and results

tasks.title: Create smart_search Integration Tests
tasks.description: Create integration tests for smart_search with reflection iterations.

implementation.purpose: Verify smart_search correctly plans, executes, and refines queries across iterations.
keyDecisions: Test with scenarios requiring multiple iterations

tasks.title: Update Documentation
tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md with new intelligent search features and tool count.

implementation.purpose: Document the new intelligent search capabilities and update tool count.
keyDecisions: Add section on Three-Layer Hybrid Search

stepByStep.details: Change '55 tools' to '58 tools' in the overview section
Add documentation for hybrid_search, analyze_query, smart_search tools with usage examples
Add new tools to the Search category or create new Intelligent Search category

successCriteria: All four tasks completed with passing tests
smart_search tool combines planning and reflection
Max iteration limits prevent infinite loops
Adequacy scoring determines when to stop
notes: Reflection loop based on SimpleMem's iterative retrieval approach
Max iterations configurable to balance quality vs. performance
Adequacy score combines quantity, diversity, and relevance
Query refinement adds hints based on missing information types
